summary: Comprehensive diagnostic matrix for Linux kernel Hard LOCKUP scenarios
init_cmds: log | grep -e lockup -e LOCKUP -e blocked -e rcu_sched

matrix.trigger: System hangs with tasks waiting for page writeback
matrix.arg_hints: addr: from memory page references in logs or stack traces
matrix.why: Examine kernel memory page for writeback issues
matrix.expect: Page flags showing writeback in progress or blocked

matrix.trigger: Multiple tasks in TASK_UNINTERRUPTIBLE state for >120 seconds
matrix.expect: List of processes stuck in UNINTERRUPTIBLE state

matrix.arg_hints: modname: module name from stack trace, addr: module address
matrix.expect: Module structure with name, version, and signature status

matrix.why: Check pending field in perf_event structure
matrix.expect: Field offset and value at given address

matrix.arg_hints: offset: from panic or backtrace location
matrix.expect: Assembly instructions around crash point

matrix.trigger: Read raw memory value for spinlock
matrix.expect: Hex value showing lock state

matrix.arg_hints: addr: spinlock address from memory read
matrix.expect: Spinlock structure with lock values

matrix.why: Verify watchdog threshold for lockup timing
matrix.expect: Watchdog threshold value in seconds

matrix.arg_hints: addr: from stack trace or register
matrix.expect: Zone details including name and flags

matrix.trigger: Examine zone lock spinlock at address {addr}
matrix.expect: Spinlock structure showing owner and state

matrix.arg_hints: cpu: CPU number from lockup message
matrix.expect: List of tasks scheduled on that CPU

matrix.trigger: Analyze backtraces of uninterruptible tasks for patterns
matrix.expect: Common function patterns across stuck tasks

matrix.why: Examine uninterruptible tasks for I/O bottlenecks
matrix.expect: Task details showing potential I/O waits

matrix.why: Check device mapper logical volumes for storage issues
matrix.expect: Logical volume status and mappings

matrix.trigger: Examine SCSI commands for timeout issues
matrix.why: Examine SCSI commands for timeout issues
matrix.expect: SCSI command status and timeout information
Current jiffies value for timing analysis

matrix.trigger: Check kernel version to confirm affected release
matrix.expect: Kernel release version string
pv_mmu_ops structure with function pointers
Size of pv_mmu_ops structure in bytes
Size of paravirt_patch_template structure

matrix.trigger: Need to identify lock address from task context
matrix.arg_hints: addr: from task structure or stack trace
matrix.why: Find specific lock address causing contention
matrix.expect: Memory address of contended lock

matrix.trigger: Disassemble function to find spinlock address
matrix.arg_hints: addr: RIP address from exception message
matrix.why: Disassemble lock function to see instruction flow
matrix.expect: Assembly code showing lock acquisition sequence

matrix.trigger: Need to examine memory content at address
matrix.arg_hints: addr: from register or stack trace
matrix.why: Check what data is being accessed
matrix.expect: String or data structure content
RCU flavors and their states
Lock value showing owner/waiter

matrix.trigger: Kernel log contains soft lockup or RCU stall messages
matrix.why: Search for lockup and RCU stall messages in kernel log
matrix.expect: Messages indicating lockup type and timing

matrix.trigger: Need to identify process owning console during panic
matrix.arg_hints: addr: console owner process address from kernel structures
matrix.why: Find process that owned console at panic time
matrix.expect: Process details including PID and command

matrix.trigger: Check loaded kernel modules and taint status
matrix.why: Examine loaded modules and kernel taint flags
matrix.expect: Module list with taint status indicators

matrix.trigger: Compare current and saved CPU interrupt counts
matrix.why: Find common CPUs between current and saved interrupt counts
matrix.expect: List of CPUs with matching interrupt counts
